data.title: TON Slips as Selling Pressure Mounts Despite Recovery Attempts
data.description:
• Telegram's cryptocurrency, TON, experienced a 4.67% intraday decline on high volume, indicating strong selling pressure.
  • The token is down 3% in the last 24 hours, with new resistance forming at $3.24.
  • A recovery pattern was observed, with prices climbing from $3.19 to $3.20, representing a 0.4% gain.

data.title: Singapore's Trident Digital Targets Mammoth $500M Raise to Establish XRP Treasury
data.description:
• Trident Digital aims to raise $500 million to create a corporate treasury focused on XRP.
  • The initiative will involve long-term XRP holdings and partnerships within Ripple's ecosystem.
  • The treasury launch is planned for 2025, with Chaince Securities advising the project.

data.title: Crypto Lending Platform Morpho V2 Brings DeFi Closer to Traditional Finance
data.description:
• Morpho V2 allows users to make offers instead of pre-allocating capital with market-driven pricing to set interest rates, rather than rigid formulas.
  • Whereas the previous version of Morpho limited loans to single collateral types, V2 supports single assets, multiple assets, or entire portfolios as collateral, including RWAs and niche assets.
  • V2 will be rolled out in the coming weeks.

data.title: Bittrue Hacker Funnels $30M Through Tornado Cash, Made $9.3M by Trading Ether
data.description:
• A hacker who stole $23 million from Bittrue in 2023 laundered $30 million in ETH through Tornado Cash, profiting $9.37 million by trading ETH as the price fluctuated in the meantime.
  • All the stolen funds are being funneled through Tornado Cash.
  • Crypto hacks cost investors $1.67 billion in the first quarter.

data.title: Crypto Lender Maple Partners with Liquid Staking Specialist Lido Finance
data.description:
• Maple now offers stablecoin loans backed by stETH through a partnership with Lido Finance.
  • Institutions can borrow without un-staking, keeping ETH rewards active.

data.title: Conduit, Braza Group Debut Stablecoin Forex Swaps for Cross-Border Payments in Brazil
data.description:
• Conduit and Brazil's Braza Group to enable real-time FX swaps using stablecoins between the Brazilian real, U.S. dollar and euro.
  • Stablecoins are becoming increasingly popular for cross-border payments, with projections suggesting significant growth in the sector by 2030.
  • The new service allows rapid settlement of transactions, contrasting with traditional FX systems that can take up to few days.

data.title: Tether Takes Minority Stake in Gold-Focused Investment Company Elemental Altus
data.description:
• Tether's investment arm has taken a minority stake in Elemental Altus, a publicly-listed precious metals investment company.
  • CEO Paolo Ardoino said the investment, which saw Tether take a stake of around 33.7% stake in Elemental, reflects its "confidence in the fundamentals of gold."
  • Tether referred to increasing its exposure to gold as a "dual pillar strategy", alongside its holdings of over 100,000 BTC ($10.7 billion).

data.title: Dollar Index Falls Below 98 for First Time in Three Years, Gives Room for Crypto Run
data.description:
• Market now pricing in 99.8 percent chance of June rate cut to 4.25 to 4.50 percent.
  • Softer inflation print at 2.4 percent year-over-year increases expectations for monetary easing.

data.title: Stripe to Acquire Crypto Wallet Startup Privy in Bid to Expand Web3 Capabilities
data.description:
• Stripe is acquiring Privy, a crypto wallet infrastructure provider, for an undisclosed amount.
  • Privy creates embedded wallets for apps and websites, simplifying crypto onboarding and reducing user drop-off.
  • The acquisition follows Stripe’s purchase of Bridge, a stablecoin infrastructure firm, and aims to make cryptocurrencies easier for developers to integrate.

data.title: GameStop Raising Another $1.75B for Potential Bitcoin Purchases
data.description:
• GameStop announced a new $1.75 billion convertible senior note offering after the close of U.S. trade on Wednesday.
  • GameStop started to pursue a bitcoin treasury strategy earlier this year and has acquired 4,710 BTC.
  • Shares were lower by 10% in after hours trade.
